name: python3-opentelemetry-exporter-prometheus
title: python3-opentelemetry-exporter-prometheus
description:
Prometheus Metric Exporter for OpenTelemetry
OpenTelemetry is an observability framework – an API, SDK, and tools that are
designed to aid in the generation and collection of application telemetry
data such as metrics, logs, and traces.
.
This library allows one to export metrics data to Prometheus
https://prometheus.io/.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-opentelemetry-exporter-prometheus because Prometheus Metric Exporter for OpenTelemetry.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-opentelemetry-exporter-prometheus as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-opentelemetry-exporter-prometheus with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-opentelemetry-exporter-prometheus --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
